title: vnd.cyrus.snooze (Cyrus/Fastmail)
description: Implement Cyrus snooze extension. Syntax: snooze <time-spec> [:mailbox <mailbox>]. Postpones message delivery to a future time by moving to a snooze mailbox and returning to INBOX at the scheduled time. Capability: vnd.cyrus.snooze. Based on draft-ietf-extra-email-snooze. Used by Fastmail. Documented in Cyrus IMAP 3.4.0+ release notes.
